feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can the Migration Cockpit be used for daily data update?
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

I would like to ask below a few questions about the Migration Cockpit!

First, we have a requirement of uploading and updating FI-AA and FI-GL in a daily basis. Based on our requirements:

  • Does SAP recommend using the Migration Cockpit for daily business?

As we received some feedback that with a little customization, the Migration cockpit can be used for daily businesses.

Additionally, as of now, in our system, the Migration Cockpit has only one Migration Object called "Fixed asset (incl, balances and transactions)" for asset related data migration.

We've received the information that implementing the SAP Notes 2537549 and 3364019 would make more Migration Objects available for assets, but when we tried to implement them, we got the error "Cannot be implemented". Could you then explain:

  • Why these SAP Notes can't be implemented? and
  • If there are any other asset related Migration Objects available?

Thanks in advance!

Best regards,
Data migration experts


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Serialized product stock upload into WM using migration template
entry.content:
While uploading stock for serialized material into warehouse bin, it is throwing error: Serial numbers not allowed in non-serialized product (000001) .

But the product is serialized and already serial numbered stock is existing.

entry.title: How to load legacy financial transactional data to S4HANA
entry.content:
Hi team,

We're part of S4HANA Migration Project where the ask is to migrate legacy transaction data to S4HANA. Generally during any S4HANA Migration Project we have to migrate the opening balances (balance sheet and PnL) which we're already doing via HANA Migration Cockpit. However the challenge with us that we have to migrate even monthly transactional data for -

a) Balance Sheet GL Transactions (actuals)

b) PnL GL Transactions (actuals)

Please advise if we have any migration object available that can support this type of load.

entry.title: Material master migration using LTMC
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Good day.

 

I know that we can create a new material master using the LTMC process, however I wanted to know if LTMC provides the flexibility to change the existing view of a material master which is already created in SAP.

 

 

 

Best PERSON_NAME,

 

[removed by moderator] PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Migrate data with CDS view behaviour in migration cockpit
entry.content:
I just want to know how to migrate data with CDS view behaviour in migration cockpit, Kindly provide us with the document if there any for the same.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit-upgraded to release 2023, Assets Master Data and Posting not visible
entry.content:
Dear SAP Migration Cockpit team,

We are using SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit Staging Tables. After system was upgraded to a new release On Premise 2023, the objects (Assets Master Data and Assets Posting) of this new release are not visible in existing projects.

As i can check they are available in the list of migration objects:

Available Migration Objects | SAP Help Portal

Thanks and best regards,

Desislava Dimova

entry.title: Has anyone experience with within a month go-live for a S/4HANA migration? I need some advices.
entry.content:
We are about to plan the Go-Live for our S/4HANA Greenfield implementation project.

The plan is to use a public holiday + weekend to go live. This should happen withing the month. Which risks are you seeing here? Can you provide me with some advices?

Many Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Extend suppliers with a different number as BP via DMC
entry.content:
Dear All,
I have a situation, where I have Employee vendors in my system. Now I need to extend (via Data migration cockpit) these but the BP number and the relevant vendor number should be different. How this can be achieved?

entry.title: Regarding Fiori App F3473_ Transport Request Management
entry.content:
We are unable to import a migration project into quality server. Unable to find any TR in the respective tile.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Selective data migration approach
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

we are contemplating to used Selective data transition approach for S/4HANA migration from ECC. If anyone has used the approach please share the Positive and pain points in this approach. I am looking for details like what kind of tools are used for ETL process specifically for Finance, Asset management and P2P modules. If there are any insightful SAP resources are available please share those details. 

Appreciate your input and help.

Thank you,

Venkat

entry.title: How to pass the Order Quantity Value in Migration Template for SD-Sales Contract?
entry.content:
Hi All,

The Order Quantity field(KWMENG) is not available in Standard template in SD-Sales Contract SAP Migration Object. But when we are passing the data, it is giving error: Please enter order quantity in quantity field of the same name V5(MsgClass) 046(MsgNo.).

When i opened the error details there is procedure to pass the order quantity: To create items relevant for delivery in service contracts, you use the change to double spaced entry option. There you can enter your data in the 'Order quantity' field.

What is "double spaced entry option" in the xml template? How to use that functionality.

Please suggest the solution.

entry.title: Issue with Product Migration Object: Errors During Preparation Phase
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working on migrating the Product object using a migration object, and I encounter the following errors during the Preparation phase. Up until this stage, everything works smoothly.

Errors Encountered:

  1. System error during the function module call in the sender system
    Message Class: DMC_RT_MSG
    Message Number: 203

  2. System error (Portion 0000000001, Conversion object Z_PRODUCT_M0U around 123713)
    Message Class: DMC_RT_MSG
    Message Number: 39

  3. _IT_IO_S_MBEW: Overwrite error: Column at serialization 10, actual column 11 (Conversion object Z_PRODUCT_M0U)
    Message Class: DMC_RT_MSG
    Message Number: 41

Context:
The migration object has been set up and executed successfully up to this phase. These errors occur during the Preparation stage of the migration process.

Could you please advise if there are any additional configurations or checks required to resolve these errors? Are there any specific areas (e.g., source system configurations, mapping rules, or settings in the migration cockpit) that I should revisit?

Any insights or suggestions would be highly appreciated!

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: Using the Migration Project in Different Client
entry.content:
LTMOM Changes

 

 S4D 100 :T-CODE-> LTMOM

 

We created one project-> * and we are trying to map some of the fields from source to target structure in the LTMC Template.

 

After completion of adding all the required fields, we have saved and created TR for using the same project in another client (S4D 300) and we have moved it to that client. Now, we want to make some changes in the same project in S4D-100, but we are not able to edit the project S4D-300 &S4D-100.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Error no selection parameter specified
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,
I am currently building a custom migration object using a custom function module in S/4HANA system using migration cockpit. I am using the staging table approach, successfully loading the data from template file to the staging table.

In the next phase of preparing the staging table, I am getting the error 'No selection parameter specified'. The error list appears as below.

The error seem to be raised in method CHECK_FOREIGN_KEYS of class CL_DMC_ACCESS_PLAN_CALC_GEN. When the migration object generation is carried out from LTMOM transaction, debugger reaches the below code and doesnt raise any messages because is_selpar value is set to 'X'.

But when prepare staging tables operation is initiated in the migration cockpit Fiori App, program /LTB/MC_GENERATE_RTO gets scheduled in the background to generate the objects but ends with the error.

 

Any help in understanding what is missing here is much appreciated.

Regards,

Athreya

entry.title: QM Catalog code group/code catalog does not support '3 - Usage decisions'
entry.content:
Hi there

Does anybody know why migration object QM/PM - Catalog code group/code (QM_CATALOG) does not support catalog type 3 - Usage decisions? Is there any alternative?

Thanks

entry.title: Usage of Advanced SQL Migration Tool for 6 TB of data
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have read the tutorial about Advanced SQL Migration Tool (https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/advanced-sql-migration-tool-ora-hana..html#top), can we use this tool to migrate an SAP Liquidity Management for Banking 6.3 running on Oracle database to HANA database (since there is no ABAP stack available and the LMS for Banking is a JAVA application, SUM tool could not be used). The Oracle DB have a size of 6 TB (uncompressed). Please provide me insights whether Advanced SQL Migration Tool would provide the necessary resilience, security and practicality for this migration, or else what would be the preferred tool from SAP, thank you in advance !

entry.title: How to load transactional object in SLT via MWB transaction instead of Table to Table load?
entry.content:
How to load transactional object in SLT via MWB transaction instead of Table to Table load, I need to load via RFC Function Module.
 I have added the object in migrate your data application then i am trying to add table in LTRC Tcode in Expert Function in create load & replication  getting error provide a valid path.

please suggest me.

Thank you.

entry.title: Migration Cockpit: Archived migrated data should be migrated again.
entry.content:
Scenario:
Migration using Migration Cockpit (with staging tables) into an existing, productive S/4HANA system.

Problem:
The customer wants to use archiving as a kind of fallback scenario. If the data quality of the already migrated data is not sufficient, it should be possible to delete it from the system using archiving function (SARA).
Once the source data has been corrected, it should be reloaded into the system using the Migration Cockpit.
What options do we have here?

entry.title: Can we create BP without Vendor/Customer role in S/4 using LTMC?
entry.content: Can we create BP without Vendor role or Customer role using any LTMC templates? Need to load BP without customer role but need to load Sales data and Company code data. Is it technically possible to load Sales and Company data using Customer Master LTMC template?

entry.title: Data Migration Cockpit: TRCO transformation rule framework
entry.content:
Dear SAP-Community,

I am currently trying to run a direct data migration from SAP ERP to SAP S/4HANA via the data migration cockpit (DMC). I keep getting errors related to certain fields, with the note: "please go to the transformation rule framework and release the mapping entry"

There is absolutely no documentation that I could find, either here or on help.sap.com on that framework. Is this maybe a name for something much simpler than a framework? I am kind of lost as to where to continue.

Any help is much appreciated!

Best regards,

Moritz
